SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-18-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Jitao Gong for Appellant/Defendant
Tommie Lee Jones, Jr. Respondent/Plaintiff with witness Sequoia Ericks.
Ai Dong Ni, #301135, Mandarin interpreter is present to assist the appellant.

This cause goes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Mr. Jones, Respondent/Plaintiff, testfies on his behalf and presents his case.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Plaintiff's Exhibit 1: Bimmers BMW Estimate Invoice for Services Dated 3/29/23
Plaintiff's Exhibit 2: 2 page copy of text messages from Mr. Jones to Mr. Gong.

Ms. Ericks testifies as a witness for Mr. Jones, Respondent/Plaintiff.

Mr. Gong, Appellant/Defendant testifies on his behalf.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Defense Exhibit A: 6-page Craiglist vehicle posts/advertisements
Defense Exhibit B: T-mobile 2-page Call Log of Mr. Gong Dated 2/27/23-3/26/23.

Both parties present additional arguments.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss, Clerk, R. Gumpal, Not Reported (305).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Judgment Entered
